$comment: WebGPU validation harness numbers, structured copy of validation/compare.py's WEBGPU dict. Source: browser run at 2026-04-21, post-migration verification — two independent IRT runs averaged for G-values to smooth RNG variance between seeds. Update by re-running the harness in-browser and pasting the latest values; the IRT G-values can be regenerated Node-side via tools/run_irt.cjs (verified to match this dict exactly at 10 keV).

dnaDamage.$comment: Counts on the 21×21 B-DNA fiber grid (3.89 Mbp target) at 10 keV, ~0.243 Gy at 30 μm box. Geometry-dependent — see CLAUDE.md indirect SSB caveat.
